doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_cmpabs_ui (mpfr/src/cmpabs_ui.c L28-L34). Compare |b| against the unsigned long c. Returns positive if |b| > c, 0 if |b| = c, negative if |b| < c. The C source aliases b through MPFR_TMP_INIT_ABS and delegates to mpfr_cmp_ui. The TS port can directly call mpfr_cmp_ui(absMPFR(b), c) -- or, equivalently, dispatch the singular cases manually (NaN throws; +/-Inf > any finite c; +/-0 vs c: c=0 -> 0, c>0 -> -1; normal vs c: exp/mantissa decide). Output normalised to {-1, 0, +1}.
c_signature: int mpfr_cmpabs_ui(mpfr_srcptr b, unsigned long c)
divergence_from_c: C returns int; TS returns number normalised to {-1, 0, +1}. C takes unsigned long (range 0..ULONG_MAX = 2^64-1); TS takes non-negative bigint in [0, 2^64-1] -- out-of-range throws MPFRError('EPREC'). NaN throws MPFRError('EDOMAIN') (matches cmp_ui's NaN policy via the alias). Sign of b is ignored.
refs: mpfr/src/cmpabs_ui.c L28-L34 -- the C reference body.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts: NaN != NaN' -- NaN throws.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts: Signed zero is real' -- but cmpabs ignores sign by definition.
